scenario.name: Scenario 8: Analytics & Reporting
scenario.description: Comprehensive performance tracking, analytics, and automated reporting

mapper.subject: AIAAR Daily Report - {{formatDate(now; 'MM/DD/YYYY')}}

mapper.prompt:
Analyze this week's auction assistant performance and provide strategic insights:

Weekly Summary:
- Total Revenue: ${{sum(70.records[].fields.revenue)}}
- Total Profit: ${{sum(70.records[].fields.profit)}}
- Average ROI: {{round(average(70.records[].fields.roi) * 100; 1)}}%
- Items Won: {{sum(70.records[].fields.itemsWon)}}
- Items Sold: {{sum(70.records[].fields.itemsSold)}}
- Average Win Rate: {{round(average(70.records[].fields.winRate) * 100; 1)}}%

Daily Performance Trend:
{{map(70.records; concat(formatDate(fields.date), ': $', fields.profit, ' profit'))}}

Provide:
1. Performance trends analysis
2. Category/brand recommendations
3. Bidding strategy adjustments
4. Market opportunity identification
5. Risk management suggestions
6. Goals for next week
